node_1.title: React
node_1.content: React (also known as React.js or ReactJS) is a free and open-source front-end JavaScript library that aims to make building user interfaces based on components more seamless

node_2.title: JavaScript
node_2.content: JavaScript is a browser-based programming language that brings interactivity to static web pages, applications and more.

node_3.title: Tailwind CSS
node_3.content: Tailwind CSS is a utility-first CSS framework that provides low-level utility classes to build custom designs without leaving your HTML.
